nasb.text: And Ephraim said, “Surely I have become rich, I have found wealth for myself; In all my labors they will find in me No iniquity, which would be sin.”

esv.text: Ephraim has said, “Ah, but I am rich; I have found wealth for myself; in all my labors they cannot find in me iniquity or sin.”

cnv.text: 以法蓮說：“我成了富翁， 我為自己發了財； 在我所有的收益中， 人不能找出我有甚麼罪孽，可算為罪惡的。”

ccb.text: 以法莲说：“我发财了， 我依靠自己致富。 没有人能从我的劳碌中找出过错和罪恶。”
